## Purpose

Describe what this change does and why it is needed.

## Systems affected

- [ ] Frontend application
- [ ] Supabase schema, RLS, function, trigger, cron, or Edge Function
- [ ] Shared generated types or contracts
- [ ] No backend change

## Required verification

- [ ] `Required - type-check and build` is green
- [ ] `Required - pull request path` is green
- [ ] I reviewed the advisory lint and test results
- [ ] I verified the affected workflow or screen

## Database changes

- [ ] Not applicable
- [ ] A versioned migration is included
- [ ] The production migration was applied and verified
- [ ] RLS and authorization implications were tested

## Operational safety

- [ ] No secrets or protected health information were committed
- [ ] Existing IDs, history, relationships, and audit records are preserved
- [ ] Rollback or failure behavior was considered
